name: TitleMax Title Pawns
description_short: Union City, GA's TitleMax Title Pawns at 4791 Jonesboro Rd STE 1 offers title loans and payday advances with convenient weekday evening hours.
description_long:
The TitleMax Title Pawns location in Union City, GA is situated at 4791 Jonesboro Rd STE 1, a convenient standalone storefront in the Union City area. This location is open Monday through Friday from 10 AM to 7 PM, Saturday from 10 AM to 4 PM, and closed Sundays, making it accessible for residents and workers throughout Union City who need flexible lending options.

At this Union City, GA branch, you can apply for title loans using your vehicle as collateral, as well as payday advances for immediate cash needs. Contact the location directly at +1 770-969-2803 to discuss your specific borrowing situation and get clarity on requirements and approval timelines.

If you're a Union City resident facing an unexpected expense and need cash quickly, this TitleMax location provides a straightforward alternative to traditional banks. Bring a valid ID, proof of income, and vehicle title if applying for a title loan; payday loans require less documentation but work the same way — fast approval and funds when you need them.
address: 4791 Jonesboro Rd STE 1, Union City, GA 30291

company_info.headquarters: 4791 Jonesboro Rd STE 1, Union City, GA 30291

pros: Same-day cash availability upon approval and in-store signing
Online application and vehicle appraisal process completed from home via cell phone photos
Accepts most credit types despite performing credit checks, serving borrowers with poor credit
Allows borrowers to keep driving the vehicle during the pawn period
5.0/5 Google rating with 465+ reviews praising staff professionalism and customer service
Quick approval timeline with instant online eligibility estimates
Long operational history (since July 2004) with established local presence
Multiple nearby locations in Atlanta area for document signing and cash pickup
cons: APR, fees, and specific rate information not disclosed on website—borrowers must inquire directly
Vehicle title used as collateral creates repossession risk if pawn cannot be repaid
Limited to emergency and short-term cash needs; not a sustainable long-term borrowing solution
Bilingual services not available at Candler Road location despite diverse customer base
In-store visit required for document signing and cash receipt, despite online application option
best_for: Borrowers with poor or damaged credit who need fast cash and cannot qualify for traditional personal loans
Vehicle owners facing sudden emergency expenses and able to repay within a short timeframe
Individuals who value speed and convenience and are comfortable using their vehicle title as collateral
Atlanta-area residents needing same-day or next-day cash with flexible credit approval
diagnosis: TitleMax is best for borrowers with poor credit who need emergency cash quickly and own a vehicle outright (with clear title). The primary caveat is that title pawns involve pledging your vehicle as collateral, creating repossession risk, and the website does not transparently disclose APR or full cost structures—borrowers must contact the store directly to understand total borrowing costs before committing.
services: Online title pawn application with vehicle appraisal via photo submission
In-store title pawn processing and document signing
Vehicle appraisal based on customer-submitted photos
Quick approval decisions with instant online eligibility estimates
Ability to keep vehicle in customer possession during pawn period
Multiple store locations for document signing and cash pickup
meta_description: TitleMax Title Pawns at 4791 Jonesboro Rd, Union City, GA. Quick title loans and payday advances with extended hours.
